variants.name: 女附魔师
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：首个被你的能力选中的外来者会变成一个不在场的镇民。[+0-1外来者]
variants.firstNightReminder: Ask the Enchantress if they'd like to choose a player. If yes, place the "No Ability" token on the Enchantress. If an outsider is chosen, place the "Enchanted" token on that player, replace their character with a not-in-play Townsfolk, and immediately wake said player to inform them of their new character.
variants.otherNightReminder: Ask the Enchantress if they'd like to choose a player. If yes, place the "No Ability" token on the Enchantress. If an outsider is chosen, place the "Enchanted" token on that player, replace their character with a not-in-play Townsfolk, and immediately wake said player to inform them of their new character.
